posts.author: tanner_elevate (Tanner Nelson | Elevate Operations)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey friends,

JustCall is another fantastic calling solution that syncs beautifully with monday.com. Whether you’re running a sales team or supporting customers, JustCall helps keep your call logs, SMS messages, and recordings neatly linked to the right item.

  • Calls & texts appear inside your monday.com boards.
  • Automate task creation after calls.
  • Add call notes that sync instantly with your CRM pipeline.

Perfect for teams that want more visibility into client communications!

Get started with JustCall here!
